title: datura stramonium f. godronii
intro: Datura stramonium f. godronii, also known as the thornapple, is a variety of the deadly nightshade plant, a flowering plant native to the Americas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful for treating muscle spasms and pain. The health benefits of Datura stramonium f. godronii include its ability to relieve symptoms of asthma and bronchitis, as well as its potential to reduce anxiety and promote relaxation. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used to make teas, tinctures, or infusions, although it is essential to exercise caution when using Datura stramonium f. godronii due to its potential toxicity and the risk of adverse reactions.
